title: Add capitalize utility in src/utils/strings.ts
description: Create a capitalize string utility function in src/utils/strings.ts with co-located unit tests in src/utils/strings.test.ts, following the existing single-function utility module pattern in src/utils/.

existing_patterns.description: Single-function utility files in src/utils/ (e.g., debounce.ts, retry.ts, flatten.ts) with co-located .test.ts files following vitest conventions
